basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Recruitment 2026: Apply for Female Health Worker (Class-3) Post – Special Drive for Divyang Candidates
basic_details.job_category: Divyang (Persons with Disabilities) – Special Recruitment Drive
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Gaun Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB), Gandhinagar has released an official advertisement for Female Health Worker (Female Health Worker, Class-3 / FHW Varg-3) positions under the Urban Health (Nagar Palika) wing of the Health and Family Welfare Department. This recruitment is exclusively for Divyang (Persons with Disabilities) candidates under a Special Recruitment Drive to fill backlog reserved vacancies. The deadline to submit online applications is June 20, 2026, by 11:59 PM.

important_dates.exam_date: Will be notified on GSSSB website
important_dates.admit_card_date: Will be available for download on GSSSB website

application_fee.details: Note: Fee must be paid online (Debit Card / Internet Banking / UPI / Wallets) on the OJAS portal. Candidates who appear in the exam will receive a fee refund. Fee paid will NOT be refunded if application is cancelled or the candidate does not appear. | Also Read: BPCL Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 55 Technical Officer, Site Manager and More Posts

age_limit.details: Age Limit: Minimum 18 years and Maximum 40 years as on June 20, 2026. | Age Relaxation for Divyang Candidates:

qualification.details: Core Education: Secondary or Higher Secondary School Certificate Examination from a recognized Board, or an equivalent qualification recognized by the Government. Professional Course: Female Health Workers Basic Training Course recognized by the Government; OR Auxiliary Nurse Midwife (ANM) Course recognized by the Government with valid registration under the Gujarat Nursing Council. Computer Knowledge: Basic knowledge of computer applications as prescribed under the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Language: Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both. | These posts are reserved exclusively for Female candidates. Male candidates are not eligible to apply. | Only candidates with benchmark disabilities as per The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 are eligible. Candidates must apply under the relevant disability group (A, B, C, D & E) as advertised. A valid Disability Certificate in Form V, VI, or VII (as applicable) under The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017 is mandatory.

salary_details.department: Health and Family Welfare Department, Gujarat

how_to_apply: Visit the official OJAS portal at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in.
Click on "Online Application" → Select GSSSB → Click on the advertisement for Female Health Worker, Class-3 (Advt. No. 417/202627).
Fill in all Personal Details and Educational Details carefully, ensuring all information matches your original certificates.

Upload your Passport-size Photo (5cm x 3.6cm, JPG, max 15KB) and Signature (2.5cm x 7.5cm, JPG, max 15KB). Photo must have a white background and must not be older than 1 year from the last application date.
Accept the Assurance (Baanhedari) terms and click Save to generate your Application Number.
Click Confirm Application to generate your Confirmation Number - save this for all future correspondence. No changes are possible after confirmation.
Pay the examination fee online by June 23, 2026 (11:59 PM) using Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet on the OJAS portal.
Download and print the completed application form. Keep it safe until the entire recruitment process is complete.

faq.question: Q1. Who can apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Only female candidates with benchmark disabilities (Divyang) as recognized under The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 are eligible. Male candidates cannot apply.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies distributed across 5 disability groups (A to E).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates will receive a fixed pay of ₹26,000/- per month for the first 5 years. After 5 years of satisfactory service, they become eligible for regular appointment in the pay scale of ₹19,900–₹63,200/- (Level-2, 7th Pay Commission).

faq.question: Q4. What is the application deadline?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is June 20, 2026 (11:59 PM) and the last date to pay the exam fee is June 23, 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q5. Is there negative marking in the exam?
faq.answer: Yes. ¼ mark will be deducted for each wrong answer in the MCQ-based exam.

faq.question: Q6. What disability certificate is required?
faq.answer: A valid disability certificate in Form V, VI, or VII (as applicable) under The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017 is required.

faq.question: Q7. Will exam fees be refunded?
faq.answer: Yes, but only for candidates who appear for the examination. Fees are non-refundable if the candidate is absent or the application is cancelled.

faq.question: Q8. Can a Scribe/Compensatory Time be availed?
faq.answer: Yes. Eligible Divyang candidates with writing limitations may apply for a Scribe or Compensatory Time (20 minutes per hour) by emailing [email protected] at least 2 days before the exam, along with required certificates.
